_readme: jarvis-graphify LLM config. Copy to jarvis-graphify-in/settings.json in your project. Set 'backend' to 'ollama', 'litellm', or 'bedrock'. Only the matching block needs to be filled in.

ollama._comment: Local or self-hosted Ollama server. Supports any model available via Ollama (qwen3, llama3, mistral, phi3, gemma2, deepseek, etc.). Start: ollama serve | Pull: ollama pull qwen3:4b

litellm._comment: Any OpenAI-compatible API: LiteLLM proxy, vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, custom Python OpenAI-style APIs, OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai), Azure OpenAI, Groq, Together AI, Anyscale, and more.
litellm._ssl_note: Set ssl_verify to false for corporate or self-signed certificates

bedrock._comment: AWS Bedrock — Claude, Llama, Mistral, Titan and more. Credentials: (1) keys below, (2) AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID / AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY env vars, (3) ~/.aws/credentials, (4) IAM role.
